overall.description: Gameplay footage from Bloodborne showing a Hunter character exploring dark gothic interiors with wooden floors and stone corridors, transitioning through medical rooms and grand staircases, then exiting to a surreal outdoor plaza featuring a massive blood moon and purple sky in Central Yharnam.

events.description: character approaches and enters a lit corridor through stone archway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dark debris-filled room toward a lit doorway

piles of broken wood and rubble
gothic stone archway leading to corridor
ornate wall-mounted lamps providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark, debris-filled gothic room with wooden floors. The Hunter character walks forward through the shadows toward a stone archway, transitioning into a warmly lit corridor as wall sconces become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit corridor with stone walls

agents.ego_description: proceeding through narrow corridors and descending stone stairs

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone walls with gothic detailing
worn stone steps descending into darkness

segments.scene_description: The character moves through narrow stone corridors illuminated by wall sconces. The environment shifts from wooden rooms to stone architecture as the character approaches a descending staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: medical examination room with red carpet

events.description: entering room with red carpet and chandelier
entering medical room with examination tables and IV stands

agents.ego_description: walking through ornate rooms and medical areas, examining the environment

ornate hanging light fixture with multiple candles
metal examination tables with restraints
tall metal stands with glowing red liquid containers
wide wooden staircase with carved banisters

segments.scene_description: The character transitions through a series of distinct interior spaces: first a room with red carpet and a chandelier, then a medical room with examination tables and IV stands containing red liquid, finally approaching a grand wooden staircase.

events.description: exiting building to outdoor plaza with dramatic sky reveal
location text 'Central Yharnam' appears on screen

agents.ego_description: climbing grand staircase and exiting the building into the open air

entered.detail: large stone portal marking the building exit
leafless gnarled trees silhouetted against sky
tall spired gothic architecture with pointed arches
massive orange-red moon dominating the purple sky
swirling violet and pink clouds covering the sky
wet cobblestone pavement reflecting the moonlight
ornate black iron fencing with spear tips

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand staircase and exits through a stone archway into a breathtaking outdoor scene. The environment reveals a surreal purple sky dominated by a massive blood moon, with gothic cathedrals and dead trees silhouetted against the vibrant clouds. The location text 'Central Yharnam' appears as the character steps onto wet cobblestones.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic city street under blood moon

events.description: character turns to survey the surroundings and architecture

agents.ego_description: walking through cobblestone streets and observing the gothic architecture

entered.detail: abandoned wooden carriage with large spoked wheels
tall iron lampposts with glowing flames

segments.scene_description: The character explores the open cobblestone streets of Central Yharnam under the blood moon, passing an abandoned horse carriage and ornate street lamps. The camera pans to show the scale of the gothic architecture as the character surveys the surreal environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic shadows of a gothic interior into a surreal, open-air plaza under a celestial anomaly. It begins in a dark, debris-strewn room with wooden floors, moving through a stone archway into narrow corridors illuminated by the warm glow of wall sconces. As the character progresses, the environment shifts through a series of distinct chambers, passing a red-carpeted room with a chandelier and a medical ward filled with IV stands, before approaching a grand wooden staircase. The scene then expands as the character ascends the stairs and exits through a final archway, where the dim interior light gives way to a vibrant purple sky dominated by a massive blood moon. Finally, the camera pans across the wet cobblestones of Central Yharnam, passing an abandoned horse carriage and ornate lamps amidst the towering silhouettes of gothic cathedrals.
